HGSS.588.0001:
It’s very attached to you.\f
This move should be perfect for a
pair like you.\f
HGSS.588.0003:
It’s adorable!\f
You should teach it good TM moves.
HGSS.588.0004:
It looks a little bit evil.
How about this TM for it?\f
HGSS.588.0006:
There are sure to be TMs that are
just perfect for your Pokémon.
HGSS.588.0007:
Mystery Gift.\f
With just a little beep, you get a gift.
HGSS.588.0008:
The Mystery Gift option is not
compatible with Game Boy Color.
HGSS.588.0009:
I collect Pokémon.
Do you have a DROWZEE?\f
Want to trade it for my MACHOP? [0200,0000]
HGSS.588.0010:
Yay! I got myself a DROWZEE!\r
Thanks!
HGSS.588.0011:
Huh? That’s not DROWZEE.
What a letdown...
HGSS.588.0012: You don’t want to trade? Aww...
HGSS.588.0013: Hi, how’s my old MACHOP doing?
HGSS.588.0014:
Huh? You...are part of Team Rocket?
Since when?
HGSS.588.0015:
On Sundays, a lady comes to check
out Pokémon.\f
She even gives away TMs!
HGSS.588.0016:
Team Rocket...
Why are they here?
HGSS.588.0017:
You can’t rename a Pokémon you get in
a trade.\f
The name is a reflection of the original
Trainer’s feelings for it.
HGSS.588.0018:
You shouldn’t wear a black suit like
that. People will think you are a part\r
of Team Rocket.\f
What? You are one of them?
